memberdef.name: ADC_getset
ADCObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "cvt.ADC", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(ADCObject), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)ADCObj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "Create an ADC instance.\n", .tp_methods = ADCObj_methods, .tp_getset = ADC_getset, .tp_new = ADCObj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)ADCObj_init, }
